problem: Why does acute pain become chronic in some people — what neural change occurs?
hypothesis: If Epigenetic methylation/demethylation of regulatory region is applied to neural, then function improves will occur because the mechanism targets the root cause directly.

experiment.protocol: Retrospective cohort analysis with 7 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: To know that you do not know is the best. — Lao Tzu
